<!-- Submitting a plugin, theme, or skill? Thanks! Fill this in and the bot will validate it. -->

## New addon

- **Name:**
- **Type:** plugin / theme / skill
- **What it does:** <!-- one line -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My addon lives in `addons/<type>s/<my-id>/` with a `manifest.json`
- [ ] For a plugin/theme: the file is in that folder and named `*.plugin.js` / `*.theme.css`
- [ ] For a skill: the folder has a `SKILL.md`
- [ ] I ran `npm run build` and committed the updated `catalog.json`
- [ ] I read the relevant guide in [`docs/`](../tree/main/docs)

<!-- Not sure how? See CONTRIBUTING.md — it walks through the whole thing. -->
